mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent.ai_table_metadata WHERE enabled = true
SELECT id, table_name, table_comment, business_domain, business_desc, table_alias FROM agent.ai_table_metadata WHERE embedding IS NULL AND enabled = true

SELECT table_name, table_comment, business_domain, business_desc FROM agent.ai_table_metadata WHERE table_name IN
#{t}
SELECT table_name FROM agent.ai_table_metadata WHERE enabled = true AND embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY embedding <=> #{vector}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT table_name FROM agent.ai_table_metadata WHERE enabled = true
mapper.update: UPDATE agent.ai_table_metadata SET embedding = #{vector}::public.vector WHERE id = #{id}
